content: The server settings pane identifies the actual accounts. and also check the copies&folders pane for any folders that you might have assigned locally. once done, you will know which are legit and which are not needed. but go carefully. :)

content: Click the vertical board between addressbook display and the edit portion. drag left and it and the save feature appears.
